synopsis.thesis: Bitcoin remains in mid-cycle accumulation phase with MVRV at 1.44 and NUPL at 0.31 indicating neither euphoria nor capitulation. Reserve Risk at historic lows confirms this as a strategic accumulation zone, while the -37% drawdown and multiple fired accumulation rules suggest cycle bottom formation rather than distribution.

Supply in profit marginally above accumulation threshold
